app.name: 2026 Boilerplate
home.title: Build Modern Web Apps
home.subtitle: A documented full-stack TypeScript boilerplate with architecture guides, tested workflows, and production-ready defaults.
home.feature.fast.title: Documentation First
home.feature.fast.description: Clear architecture, script, and client/server guides help teams ramp up quickly and stay consistent.
home.feature.auth.title: Global by Default
home.feature.auth.description: Built-in i18n, accessibility patterns, and reusable UI components support inclusive product development.
home.feature.production.title: Ship with Confidence
home.feature.production.description: Standardized scripts, Cypress coverage, and typed Redux patterns make release workflows predictable.
